days.text: Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. One or two showers later. Force 2 to 4 southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. A few showers later. Possible thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 west to southwesterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers later. Possible thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
